title: Defines the structure for session todo items
purpose: Provides a TypeScript interface that describes the shape of todo items within a session, including their state, metadata, and ordering information.

steps.content: Define the interface for session todo items.
Specify the unique identifier field for each todo.
Specify the textual content of the todo item.
Specify the completion status of the todo item.
Specify the ordering position of the todo item.
Specify the creation timestamp of the todo item.
Specify the last update timestamp of the todo item.
